docket_entries.description: MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY ANTHONY PELOSI IS WITHDRAWN BY DEFENDANT. CASE IS CONTINUED TO TO MAY-13-2013 AT 1:30 PM IN 506 FOR PROGRESS REPORT. IF NO APPEARANCE, CASE IS OFF CALENDAR. "MEDIATED. JUDGMENT CREDITOR HAS AGREED TO SIGN A SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT UPON PAYMENT BY THE JUDGMENT DEBTOR OF $936.39." PER JUDGE DONALD MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: M. GOODMAN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
COPYING FEES (6 PAGE) PAID BY DEFENDANT PELOSI, ANTHONY

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$20.00) SERVED MAY-20-2010, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT PELOSI, ANTHONY

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LEE, AL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PELOSI, ANTHONY $776.39 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $826.39, DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SUBPOENA DUCES TECUM ISSUED TO ANTHONY PELOSI
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-29-2010 - JUDGMENT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. COMMISSIONER: PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF MAY-13-2013 IS OFF CALENDAR PER PROGRESS REPORT OF 4/10/13. NO APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT PELOSI, ANTHONY
